# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing.

Resources:
  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MyServerlessEventQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600 # 14 days in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 300 # 5 minutes in seconds
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 5 # Long polling for 5 seconds

  MySQSQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MySQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref MySNSTopic
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
            Resource: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: MyServerlessEventTopic

  MySNSTopicSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
      TopicArn: !Ref MySNSTopic
      RawMessageDelivery: 'true' # Deliver raw message to SQS queue without SNS metadata

Outputs:
  SQSQueueName:
    Description: Name of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.QueueName
  SQSQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref MySQSQueue
  SQSQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
  SNSTopicName:
    Description: Name of the SNS Topic
    Value: !GetAtt MySNSTopic.TopicName
  SNSTopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref MySNSTopic
